notes: The product name "2930F-48G-PoE+" refers to the JL262A (4x 1G SFP uplinks). A closely related model, JL256A (2930F-48G-PoE+ 4SFP+), has 4x SFP+ 10G uplinks instead. No USB-A port is listed in any specification source for either model. The IEC C14 inlet type is inferred from the compatible power cord (NEMA 5-15P to C13), which confirms a C14 device inlet — standard for 1U switches in this class. The console port is a dual-personality RJ-45/USB micro-B combo. SFP ports listed individually as 4 separate entries; labeled on-device as SFP 49–52 in some documentation. Source is a reputable reseller spec page; HPE official store page returned 403.

ports.name: Console
ports.note: Dual-personality serial console port (RJ-45 or USB micro-B)

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: IEC C14 inlet; ships with NEMA 5-15P to C13 power cord (100–240 VAC, 50/60 Hz)
